title: Content reusability in eLearning - ICRISAT’s experiments with LMS
abstract: The World Wide Web has drastically changed the way of information dissemination especially in the field of education, and in particular for open and distance learning. The relatively small investment required to set up a website enabled a great many institutions to become instant content providers. After the initial rush to get online, the challenge faced was to develop an efficient methodology to facilitate knowledge management and sharing...
keywords: ODL or Open and Distance Learning
publication: International Journal of the Computer, The Internet and Management
